David Chen, CPA
Senior Accountant, New York, NY
david.chen.cpa@example.com | 555-201-3013 | linkedin.com/in/david-chen-cpa

SUMMARY
Licensed CPA and senior accountant with 6 years in public and corporate
accounting. Owns the month-end close, general ledger, and financial-statement
preparation in accordance with GAAP, with audit and SOX experience.

EXPERIENCE
Senior Accountant — Meridian Corp (2021–present)
- Own the month-end and year-end close, preparing journal entries, account
  reconciliations, and consolidated financial statements under US GAAP.
- Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable cycles and maintain the general
  ledger; coordinate the annual external audit and SOX controls testing.
- Prepare tax provision schedules and support the controller on technical
  accounting and internal-controls improvements.

Staff Accountant / Audit Associate — Brightman & Co CPAs (2018–2021)
- Performed financial-statement audits, tested internal controls, and prepared
  corporate and partnership tax returns for clients.

SKILLS
Accounting, GAAP, general ledger, month-end close, journal entries, account
reconciliation, financial statements, accounts payable, accounts receivable,
audit, internal controls, SOX, tax, CPA, QuickBooks, NetSuite

LICENSES & EDUCATION
Certified Public Accountant (CPA), New York
B.S. Accounting, Baruch College (Zicklin), 2018
